spacing_and_layout.grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-px bg-[#050505] border-y border-[#050505]
spacing_and_layout.component_style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use 1px borders with border-collapse behavior. Surfaces are separated by stark 1px black borders instead of gaps to expose the 'skeleton'.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#050505] text-[#050505] hover:bg-[#F4F4F4].
components.cards: Flat background, rounded-none, no soft shadows. For active state, use sharp hard offset shadow (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #050505) and 1px solid black border.
components.inputs: Shadcn based, but strictly override to rounded-none, border-black ring-offset-white focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#002FA7] focus-visible:border-black.
components.tables_lists: Dense lists. Rows separated by 1px solid black border. Use JetBrains Mono for numbers/prices/rooms.
components.badges: Square borders (rounded-none), text-xs font-mono uppercase, solid colors. e.g., bg-[#FF3B30] text-white for NEW.

animations.micro: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-150). No bouncy or slow easing.
animations.scanner: A pulsing indicator (bg-[#00C950]) next to 'SCANNING ACTIVE'. Use a mono-spaced countdown timer ticking down from 3:00. Marquee of recent logs ('Checking Immomio... Found 0 new') in a retro-futuristic terminal bar at the bottom.

images.description: Stylish open-plan living room in modern urban apartment

icons.instructions: Use 'bold' or 'fill' weights to match the heavy brutalist typography. Examples: Radar, Funnel, Clock, EnvelopeSimple, Buildings.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., 'data-testid="filter-price-input"', 'data-testid="scan-status-indicator"'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a real-time scanner dashboard for Immomio Hamburg.
The UI MUST follow a Swiss Brutalist, 'Control Room' aesthetic. Everything must have sharp edges (rounded-none), thick or crisp black borders (1px solid #050505).
Layout structure: A top navigation/status bar showing active scanning status and next scan timer (3 minutes countdown).
Sidebar / Filter Panel: Settings (Email config for maximnikityk@ukr.net, Resend integration toggles) and Search Filters (Min/Max Price, Room count).
Main Content Area: Displays a data-dense grid or feed/history of detected listings. Use the 'Grid Borders' component style to make the table look like an architect's blueprint.
Typography: Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings. Use JetBrains Mono for data points like Price, Rooms, Square meters, and timestamps. Use IBM Plex Sans for general body text.
Do NOT use gradients, soft drop shadows, or rounded corners.
Write the code using standard .js / .jsx extensions. Do NOT use .tsx.
